channel.title: Azure.microsoft.com/En-Us/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Azure.microsoft.com/En-Us/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Introducing Azure Accelerate for Databases: Modernize your data for AI with experts and investments
item.description: Azure Accelerate for Databases helps organizations modernize their databases and build AI-ready capabilities. The post Introducing Azure Accelerate for Databases: Modernize your data for AI with experts and investments appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog. Link to article: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/introducing-azure-accelerate-for-databases-modernize-your-data-for-ai-with-experts-and-investments/
